caveats.title: Single-provider only
caveats.detail: Twelve Data is used as single-provider caveated context only; no source truth, failover, divergence, or source2 conflict check.

caveats.title: No official calendar/event layer
caveats.detail: calendar_event_source_not_in_v1_scope; no CPI/FOMC/NFP/central-bank event blocking logic.

caveats.title: Observation-only candidate detection
caveats.detail: Candidate rows are observation objects only; not signals, not trade recommendations, not entries.

caveats.title: One active lifecycle row remained active in latest proof
caveats.detail: Last accepted daily proof had 4 candidates, 3 final outcomes, 1 active tracking row, and 0 new observation candidates.

caveats.title: Not production readiness
caveats.detail: Local proof passed for personal use; scheduler heartbeat and local validation do not imply production readiness.

caveats.title: Row/matrix posture unchanged
caveats.detail: Row 2 retained unopened; Rows 6–7 deferred re-entry; matrix-complete ≠ matrix-open.
